---

## Attributes

| Attribute | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Program scope | Development and approval of a written QC Plan; establishment and execution of an inspection schedule aligned with construction phases; documentation and execution of material and systems testing protocols; operation of a deficiency identification, tracking, and remediation-verification system; QC status reporting through weekly coordination meetings (DEL-019-02); quality assurance oversight over all subcontractors engaged on site; coordination of all inspection requests with the County project representative; provision of inspection reports to the County | _CONTEXT.md — Scope Definition; Specification Scope > Included (aligned per X-003) |
| QC Plan status | Required — documented and approved prior to construction commencement | _CONTEXT.md — Success Criteria; RFP §4.7.5 |
| Inspection coverage | All inspections per schedule; County project representative present for all inspections | _CONTEXT.md — Success Criteria; RFP §3.3.2 |
| Deficiency standard | Deficiencies identified and corrected; final work meets specification requirements (specific acceptance criteria per material/system type TBD pending IFC specifications) | _CONTEXT.md — Success Criteria; Specification REQ-QC-06 |
| Testing | Protocols executed; results documented (acceptance criteria TBD pending IFC specifications — see Specification REQ-QC-05) | _CONTEXT.md — Success Criteria |
| Quality oversight mechanism | QC results reported in weekly coordination meetings (DEL-019-02) | _DEPENDENCIES.md |
| Subcontractor link | QC activities inform subcontractor performance evaluations (DEL-019-03) | _DEPENDENCIES.md |
| Commissioning link | Construction QC activities must be complete before transition to PKG-020 | _DEPENDENCIES.md |
| County verification right | County project representative must be present for all inspections and provided copies of all complete inspection reports | RFP §3.3.2 |
| Quality control plan — proposal requirement | Proponent must describe accountability for quality, construction oversight, material quality control, reporting, correction of deficient work | RFP §4.7.5 |
| Evaluation weighting (QC Plan) | 5% of proposal score | RFP §5.1.2 Item G |
| QC Manager qualifications | TBD — no minimum qualification or competency requirements defined in accessible sources (see Specification REQ-QC-11 and warranted item B-003) | Specification REQ-QC-11; _SEMANTIC_LENSING.md B-003 |
| QC performance metrics | TBD — no quantitative KPIs (e.g., deficiency closure rate targets, inspection completion percentage targets) currently defined (see warranted item A-004) | _SEMANTIC_LENSING.md A-004 |

---

## Conditions

| Condition | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Prime Contractor designation active | Yes — for full project duration whenever Proponent's personnel, equipment, or subcontractors are on site | RFP §2.15 |
| Alberta OH&S legislation applies | ASSUMPTION: likely applicable — Prime Contractor designation per Alberta OH&S Act; specific clause text not available in accessible sources (specific OHS Act sections, e.g., Part 37 re Prime Contractors, TBD — see warranted item A-002) | RFP §2.15 (designation referenced); Alberta OHS Act (location TBD) |
| Deficiency holdback mechanism | Owner may retain amount equal to estimated value of outstanding deficiencies (Deficiency Holdback) until corrected and approved | RFP §2.11 |
| Guarantee period | Construction period plus 2 years post-CCC; defects must be rectified within 10 days of Owner written instruction | RFP §2.10 |
| Lien holdback | 10% of value of Work withheld per Prompt Payment and Construction Lien Act (Alberta); released upon project completion documentation | RFP §2.13.2 |
| Inspection request submission | All inspection requests to be submitted by Proponent | RFP §3.3.2 |
| IFC drawings required | All construction must conform to Issued for Construction drawings signed/stamped by P.Eng. licensed in Alberta | RFP §3.3.2 |
| CCDC 14-2013 QC provisions | TBD — CCDC 14-2013 is the governing contract form (RFP §2.7) but specific QC-related contract clauses (e.g., inspection rights, deficiency obligations, guarantee provisions) have not been verified against the actual contract document (see warranted item E-001) | RFP §2.7; CCDC 14-2013 (location TBD) |

## Construction

| Element | Description | Source |
|---|---|---|
| QC Plan | Written document describing oversight approach, inspection protocol, material QC, deficiency correction communication processes, and reporting to Owner (minimum content requirements to be aligned with Procedure Phase A, Step A2 — see warranted item F-001) | RFP §4.7.5; _CONTEXT.md |
| Inspection schedule | Schedule of inspections aligned with construction phases; County representative to attend all inspections | RFP §3.3.2; _CONTEXT.md |
| Testing protocols | Documented testing procedures for materials and systems; results recorded; acceptance criteria per material/system type TBD pending IFC specifications; measurement/test method standards (e.g., ASTM, CSA) TBD (see warranted item B-002) | _CONTEXT.md; Specification REQ-QC-05 |
| Deficiency tracking system | System for logging, tracking, and verifying remediation of identified deficiencies; deficiency severity classification (critical/major/minor) TBD (see warranted item E-003) | _CONTEXT.md; Specification REQ-QC-06 |
| QC reporting forum | Weekly coordination meetings (DEL-019-02) used as reporting vehicle for QC status and deficiency reports | _DEPENDENCIES.md |
| Subcontractor QC oversight | QC activities extended to all subcontractors under Prime Contractor responsibility; subcontractor conformance demonstration approach TBD (see warranted item C-001) | RFP §2.15; decomposition PKG-019 description |
| QC Manager role | Daily inspections, testing coordination, deficiency documentation (qualification requirements TBD — see warranted item B-003) | _CONTEXT.md — Key Roles |
| Project Manager role | Overall QC oversight and coordination | _CONTEXT.md — Key Roles |
| Inspection report template | TBD — no standard inspection report form or template defined; required for methodical uniformity across inspectors (see warranted item C-002) | _SEMANTIC_LENSING.md C-002 |
| QC record retention | Records retained for project duration + guarantee period; specific retention format and storage location TBD (see warranted item X-002) | RFP §2.10; Procedure Phase C, Step C4 |
